name: Herbed Zucchini-Pea Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine chicken broth, onions, parsley, oregano, chervil, and salt and pepper to taste in a large saucepan. Bring to boil.
2. Add zucchini and boil until tender, about 5 minutes.
3. Transfer mixture to blender.
4. Cook peas in boiling salted water until tender. Drain.
5. Add peas to blender and puree until smooth.
6. Add sugar, horseradish, and lemon juice; blend thoroughly.
7. Mix in half and half. Cover and refrigerate at least 5 hours.
8. Adjust seasoning with salt and pepper.
9. Ladle soup into bowls.
10. Garnish with sliced rounds of lemon and zucchini.
